title: “Pretty insane” – Gauff completes her Grand Slam set with a first Wimbledon semifinal

title: Team Social Evening

Followed by drinks and homemade pizza, thanks to all who took part. The post Team Social Evening appeared first on Chandos Lawn Tennis Club .

title: Women’s First Team Win Middlesex Premier League East
description: Great job by our Women's team to capture a first Middlesex Premier League East title in many years winning a group division of 7 excellent teams. The team were undefeated all season and came home with a very high average sets and match score . They will now compete in a Play of against the Premier League West Winners Campden Hill for the overall title scheduled for 22 September from 1:00pm. A big thanks to all the players who took part. description: Members have brought their love of the game to help support and create a grass roots scheme bringing tennis to children alongside the Jason Roberts Foundation . title: Teams Compete Well In The Worldpay National Premier League Finals
description: A great effort by both teams who missed out on competing for the National Premier League Doubles Finals title . Our Men lost out in the first round to number 4 seeds Edinburgh by a 3-1 match loss. Great effort by the team to make the Finals for the First time in 4 years. title: Kapari Represents in African Games
description: Every couple of years, athletes from various disciplines and specialities train and prepare to capture the chance to compete at the Olympics. As an athlete, there isn't a more eloquent honour than carrying the badge of participating at the Olympics with the colours of your nation adorning you. This year, that chance for some athletes from the African continent was at the 13th All-Africa Games held in Accra.
